items.name_en: [Genuine Leather] #LouLou puffer# LOULOU PUFFER Mini Quilted Lambskin Bag, a super hot style with the latest mini size from the counter! Made with genuine ZP leather, soft and delicate to the touch, small and cute like a marshmallow when carried! Features a zippered interior pocket for phone and valuables, and a card slot; otherwise, no extra pockets, small but fully functional! Size: 23x15.5x5.8cm Model: 620333 168520

items.name_en: [Genuine Leather] 🔥 The GG Marmont series reinterprets the classic quilted V-shaped leather with a new silhouette and size, showcasing the charm of early autumn. This medium tote is crafted in beige, with gold-tone hardware complementing the stylish silhouette.
items.name_cn:
[Genuine Leather] 🔥 The GG Marmont series reinterprets the classic quilted V-shaped leather with a new silhouette and size, showcasing the charm of early autumn. This medium tote is crafted in beige, with gold-tone hardware complementing the stylish silhouette.
Beige quilted V-shaped leather
Gold-tone hardware
Brown suede texture, microfiber lining
Double G logo
Inside: 1 zip pocket
Handle height: 22cm
Zip closure

items.name_en: [Genuine Leather] LOULOU PUFFER_ Large 35cm. Quilted Lambskin Bag, made with genuine authentic leather, soft and delicate to the touch, like holding a cloud ☁️; classic Y-logo, chain, and buckle hardware are all in Brushed Gold hardware; the bag uses a magnetic snap closure at the opening, offering excellent sealing and security! Features a zippered interior pocket for phone and valuables, otherwise no extra pockets, easy to use! Genuine leather! Genuine leather! Genuine leather! Size: 23x15.5x5.8cm Style No: 620333 Denim 168450
items.name_cn: [Genuine Leather] LOULOU PUFFER_ Large 35cm. Features a zippered interior pocket for phone and valuables, otherwise no extra pockets, easy to use! Genuine leather! Genuine leather! Genuine leather! Size: 23x15.5x5.8cm Style No: 620333 Denim 168450

items.name_en: [Heart][Rose] Original 2024 Early Spring Style [Heart][Rose]! Dior Book Tote
items.name_cn:
[Heart][Rose] Original 2024 Early Spring Style [Heart][Rose]! Dior Book Tote
Inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this tote bag is a flagship product embodying Dior aesthetics. Designed for daily essentials, this medium tote features all-over embroidery paired with the iconic blue Dior Oblique pattern and a "Christian Dior" logo on the front. Fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, it can be paired with other small accessories or Mitzah scarves for a cohesive look!
Adjustable, removable embroidered shoulder strap
Internal zip pocket
2 internal patch pockets
Includes dust bag
Number: M1324CZBB_M928
Dimensions: 36.5×28×17.5cm

items.name_en: [Highest market version, welcome to compare]
items.name_cn:
[Highest market version, welcome to compare]
RIDER backpack by Dior leak jacquard
Item number: 1VOBA088YKY_H00N
The "Rider" backpack features an attractive mini silhouette reminiscent of a classic school bag. We arrange the classic design in a modern way using a black "Dior" logo patch. Functional details include double zippers, a large front zip pocket, and an adjustable padded strap, making it an essential item for daily use.
Black "Dior leak" jacquard
Front "DIOR" rubber signature
Internal embossed "DIOR" signature
Double zipper closure
Adjustable padded nylon strap
Leather top handle
Back reinforced with technical mesh
Front zip pocket
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy
Size: 30x42x15cm
Fits tablet, 15-inch laptop, and documents

items.name_en: [Highest version original factory leather top-tier original set with full counter packaging] 25c Kelly Lamb Skin
items.name_cn:
[Highest version original factory leather top-tier original set with full counter packaging] 25c Kelly Lamb Skin
Fashion is a cycle, the big hot vintage Kelly is re-designed by Chanel to bring it back to life. Vintage Kelly is famous for its classic handle handbag, adding a leather chain shoulder strap to the base to subvert tradition, making it more casual and convenient
Model: AS4416
Size: 13-19-7
Full set packaging
